mapper.select:
select A.TITLE , A.EXPLN , DATE_FORMAT(A.POST_STR, '%Y-%m-%d') POST_STR , DATE_FORMAT(A.POST_END, '%Y-%m-%d') POST_END , A.REG_ID , A.REG_DTM , A.MOD_ID , A.MOD_DTM , A.NOTI_SEQ , B.USER_ID_NM from T_NOTICE_TRAN A , T_ADMIN_MST B where 1=1 AND A.MOD_ID = B.USER_ID AND DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y%m%d') BETWEEN A.POST_STR AND A.POST_END AND DATE_FORMAT(A.REG_DTM,'%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date}
AND (A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
AND (A.EXPLN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
AND (A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR A.EXPLN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
order by A.REG_DTM DESC

select TITLE , EXPLN , DATE_FORMAT(POST_STR, '%Y-%m-%d') POST_STR , DATE_FORMAT(POST_END, '%Y-%m-%d') POST_END , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM , NOTI_SEQ from T_NOTICE_TRAN where 1=1 and NOTI_SEQ = #{noti_seq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_NOTICE_TRAN (TITLE , EXPLN , POST_STR , POST_END , USE_YN , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM ) VALUES (#{title}, #{expln}, DATE_FORMAT(#{post_str}, '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(#{post_end}, '%Y%m%d'), #{use_yn}, #{mod_id}, now(), #{mod_id}, now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_NOTICE_TRAN SET TITLE = #{title}, EXPLN = #{expln}, POST_STR = DATE_FORMAT(#{post_str}, '%Y%m%d'), POST_END = DATE_FORMAT(#{post_end}, '%Y%m%d'), USE_YN = #{use_yn}, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MOD_DTM = now() where 1=1 and NOTI_SEQ = #{noti_seq}
UPDATE T_NOTICE_TRAN SET USE_YN = 'N', MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MOD_DTM = now() where 1=1 and NOTI_SEQ = #{noti_seq}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( select A.USER_UUID , A.USER_ID , A.USER_NM , A.USER_GB , RTRIM(A.PHONE) PHONE , A.GENDER , A.BIRTH , A.BLOD_GB , A.JOIN_YMD , A.HEIGHT , A.WEIGHT , IFNULL(A.EMAIl,'') AS EMAIl , IFNULL(B.DTL_CODE_NM,'') AS DTL_CODE_NM , IFNULL((SELECT MAX(CGM_DTM) FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = A.USER_UUID),'') CGM_DTM , IFNULL(DATEDIFF(NOW() , (SELECT MAX(CGM_DTM) FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = A.USER_UUID)),'') CGM_GAP , A.REG_DTM from T_USER_TRAN A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_COMM_MST_DTL B ON B.CODE = 'CD7' AND B.DTL_CODE = A.BLOD_GB Where 1=1 ) A WHERE 1= 1
AND (A.CGM_GAP >= 1 OR A.EAT_GAP >= 1 OR A.CGM_GAP = '' OR A.EAT_GAP = '')
AND A.USER_UUID <> ''
AND (A.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{user_nm},'%') OR A.PHONE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{user_nm},'%'))
order by A.REG_DTM , A.USER_NM, A.PHONE

select A.USER_UUID , A.USER_ID , A.USER_NM , A.PHONE , A.GENDER , A.USER_GB , A.BIRTH , A.HEIGHT , A.WEIGHT , A.JOIN_YMD , IFNULL(A.EMAIl,'') AS EMAIl , IFNULL(B.DTL_CODE_NM,'') AS DTL_CODE_NM , A.BLOD_GB , A.REG_DTM from T_USER_TRAN A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_COMM_MST_DTL B ON B.CODE = 'CD7' AND B.DTL_CODE = A.BLOD_GB where 1=1 and A.USER_UUID = #{user_uuid}

select USER_ID , USER_ID_NM , USER_NM, USER_GB, USER_PW, DEPT_NM, DATE_FORMAT(START_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS START_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(END_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS END_DATE, BIGO, USEYN, REG_DTM, LOCK_YN from T_ADMIN_MST where 1=1
AND USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{user_nm},'%')
order by USER_NM , REG_DTM

SELECT USER_ID , USER_NM , USER_ID_NM , IFNULL(USER_GB,'D') AS USER_GB, USER_PW, USEYN, IFNULL(DEPT_NM,'') AS DEPT_NM FROM T_ADMIN_MST WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id} AND NOW() BETWEEN START_DATE AND END_DATE

SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_ID_NM , USER_GB, USER_PW, DEPT_NM, DATE_FORMAT(START_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS START_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(END_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS END_DATE, BIGO, USEYN , LOCK_YN FROM T_ADMIN_MST WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_ADMIN_MST SET USEYN = 'N' , MOD_ID = 'admin' , MOD_DTM = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id}
mapper.select:
select FAQ_GB , QSTN_CONTS , ANSR_CONTS , USE_YN , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM , FAQ_SEQ from T_FAQ_TRAN where 1=1
AND FAQ_GB = #{searchGb}
AND (QSTN_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR ANSR_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
AND FAQ_GB = #{searchGb} AND (QSTN_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR ANSR_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
order by MOD_DTM DESC
select FAQ_GB , QSTN_CONTS , ANSR_CONTS , USE_YN , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM , FAQ_SEQ from T_FAQ_TRAN where 1=1 and FAQ_SEQ = #{faq_seq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FAQ_TRAN (FAQ_GB , QSTN_CONTS , ANSR_CONTS , USE_YN , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{faq_gb}, #{qstn_conts}, #{ansr_conts}, #{use_yn}, 'admin', now(), 'admin', now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_FAQ_TRAN SET QSTN_CONTS = #{qstn_conts}, ANSR_CONTS = #{ansr_conts}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, MOD_ID = 'admin' , MOD_DTM = now() where 1=1 and FAQ_SEQ = #{faq_seq}
UPDATE T_FAQ_TRAN SET USE_YN = 'N', MOD_ID = 'admin', MOD_DTM = now() where 1=1 And FAQ_SEQ = #{faq_seq}
mapper.select:
Select A.ASQ_SEQ , A.USER_UUID , B.USER_NM , B.GENDER , B.BIRTH , A.QSTN_TITL , A.QSTN_CONTS , A.QSTN_YMD , A.ANSR_CONTS , A.ANSR_YN From T_ASQ_TRAN A , T_USER_TRAN B where 1=1 AND A.USER_UUID = B.USER_UUID
AND (QSTN_TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
order by QSTN_YMD DESC
Select ASQ_SEQ , USER_UUID , QSTN_TITL , QSTN_CONTS , QSTN_YMD , ANSR_CONTS , ANSR_YN From T_ASQ_TRAN where 1=1 and ASQ_SEQ = #{asqSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_ASQ_TRAN SET QSTN_TITL = #{qstnTitl}, QSTN_CONTS = #{qstnConts}, ANSR_CONTS = #{ansrConts}, ANSR_YN = #{ansrYn}, QSTN_YMD = NOW() where 1=1 and ASQ_SEQ = #{asqSeq}
